effect.description: The 'D' (in DESERVE) and 'M' (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint of the headline color, a nod to the 'd' and 'm' of dermatomyositis.
effect.rationale: nod to the 'd' and 'm' of dermatomyositis

quotes: The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.

effect.description: Two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

quotes: Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

effect.description: Full lockup copy must be used verbatim.
effect.verbatim_copy: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
